description_long: This object is a small, toy-like airplane featuring a white fuselage with black and red accents, and a blue pilot figure seated in an open cockpit. The wings are straight and low-mounted, each tipped with black star-shaped elements and yellow round details, possibly representing lights or missiles. The nose is elongated and red, resembling a laser or probe, while the rear features two black conical engine exhausts and a red nozzle. The tail assembly is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers. The airplane is constructed from interlocking plastic components, giving it a modular, blocky appearance typical of LEGO-style toys.
description: A small, blocky toy airplane with a blue pilot, white fuselage, red nose, and black-tipped wings, built from interlocking plastic parts.
description_view_0: Front oblique view showing the red nose, blue pilot, and star-tipped wings with yellow details.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated nose, open cockpit, and visible engine details at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view displaying the twin black engine exhausts, red nozzle, and the back of the pilot's helmet.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the wing layout, cockpit position, and symmetrical tail assembly.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and black star-shaped wingtip elements.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines, visible as black conical exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit with a blue pilot figure.
